steps.title: Find the constant ratio
steps.content:
The problem says the ratio of $y$ to $x$ is constant. From the first row,
$$\frac{y}{x}=\frac{4}{1}=4.$$

steps.title: Find the missing table value
steps.content: When $x=40$, $y=4(40)=160$. Therefore the missing value is $160$, which matches the correct answer.
